schema:
interface DodoCheckoutArgs { planId: string; customerId?: string; successUrl?: string; cancelUrl?: string; }
// Usage: await callMcpTool('dodo', 'dodo_checkout', args: DodoCheckoutArgs)

interface DodoMeterArgs { customerId: string; event: string; amount: number; }
// Usage: await callMcpTool('dodo', 'dodo_meter', args: DodoMeterArgs)
// Webhook signature verification MUST use HMAC-SHA256 over the raw request body comparing against x-dodo-signature.
